title: sedum rosea var. atropurpureum
intro: Sedum rosea var. atropurpureum, also known as Atropurpureum Sedum, is a succulent plant belonging to the Crassulaceae family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which may help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Sedum rosea var. atropurpureum include potential antiseptic and antifungal properties, which may aid in the treatment of various infections and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made by infusing the leaves in water or oil, and it is often used topically in the form of a salve or ointment.
